_comment: SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for review model pricing, USD per 1M tokens. review.py loads this (no hardcoded rates); downstream analysis (TauCetiData) fetches this same file. input/output = list price (Anthropic: platform.claude.com; OpenRouter-routed incl. gpt-5.5: openrouter.ai). cache_read = price for prompt-cache input tokens (Anthropic ~0.1x input; OpenAI gpt-5.5 = $0.50). Edit here only.
